title: Finance Director
description:
X Star is a Singapore-based AI innovator transforming the automotive finance industry. Since our founding in 2023, we have expanded our operational footprint across Asia Pacific, Latin America, and the Middle East.

We leverage proprietary artificial intelligence to provide consumers with cutting-edge financial services while delivering powerful technology solutions that enhance value for our partners. Our global network now includes over 2,000 car manufacturers, dealers, and financial institutions.

Backed by a dedicated team of 200 professionals and a financing facility of $150 million as of H1 2025, X Star is accelerating its global expansion to bring intelligent, seamless mobility solutions to a worldwide consumer base.

Headquartered in Singapore, X Star operates across key markets, including Japan and Mexico. Our Singapore business alone has facilitated over SGD 100 million in cumulative loans, demonstrating strong market traction and scalability. As a result of continuous growth of business, we are looking for an experienced Finance Director to join us and play a critical role in shaping our future success.

Key Responsibilities

Strategic Financial Planning

Develop and implement financial strategies aligned with organizational goals.

Provide financial insights to support long-term business planning.

Financial Management

Oversee budgeting, forecasting, and financial reporting processes.

Monitor cash flow, investments, and capital structure.

Ensure compliance with accounting standards and regulatory requirements.

Leadership & Governance
Lead and mentor the finance team to achieve departmental objectives.

Present financial reports to the board and senior management.

Establish internal controls and risk management frameworks.

Manage relationships with banks, auditors, and external stakeholders.

Optimize financial systems and processes for efficiency.

Support mergers, acquisitions, and other corporate transactions.


Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field

Professional certification (e.g., CPA, ACCA, CFA) preferred.

Minimum of 10 years’ experience in senior financial management roles

Strong knowledge of corporate finance, accounting principles, and regulatory frameworks.


Skills & Competencies

Leadership & Communication: Ability to inspire and manage teams, with excellent presentation skills.

Analytical Thinking: Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.

Strategic Vision: Capacity to align financial planning with organizational strategy.

Technical Expertise: Proficiency in financial software, ERP systems, and advanced Excel.

Integrity & Compliance: Commitment to ethical standards and regulatory adherence.

postedCompany.description: Yi Star is a wholly-owned subsidiary of HK-Listed Yixin Group to expand the Group's footprints in Automotive, Mobility, Media and Technology to capture new growth opportunities in the APAC region.
postedCompany.name: X STAR TECHNOLOGY PTE. LTD.
